title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 294.100 - Presence of minor as evidence of employment
text:
294.100.  Presence of minor as evidence of employment. — The presence of any child under sixteen years of age in any place where labor is employed shall be presumptive evidence that said child is employed therein.
(RSMo 1939 § 9628, A.L. 1957 p. 525 § 14) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14093; 1919 § 1120; 1909 § 1724
